title: Data Warehousing Tool Ecosystem
description: A flowchart illustrating the main categories of tools used in a data warehousing environment and their primary functions.
relationships: ETL Tools feed cleaned data into the Data Storage system
Metadata Tools catalog data about the data stored in the DBMS
Data Quality Tools ensure integrity for the ETL process and stored data
BI Platforms query and analyze data from the Data Storage
Data Modeling Tools design the structure for the Data Storage
